_Last updated: 2026-04-02 10:51 UTC_

# Story Coverage Report

| ID | Story | Status | Notes |
|----|-------|--------|-------|
| 1.1 | User Registration | ✅ Aligned | Registration validates unique username/email, grants initial tokens, records `created_at` timestamp, and creates user account. |
| 1.2 | User Login | ⚠️ Diverged | Login uses username + password and returns session; however, logged-out users can still access several GET endpoints (`/leaderboard`, `/players`, `/teams`, `/schedule`, `/roster/{id}`, `/deck`, `/weights`) without authentication. Some of these may be intentional (leaderboard), but `/roster/{user_id}` exposes any user's roster without auth. |
| 1.3 | User Receive Temporary Password | ✅ Aligned | `/forgot-password` generates a temp password, emails it, sets `must_change_password` flag. Returns 200 regardless to avoid username enumeration. Story says "error if no email" but implementation silently succeeds—acceptable as a security measure. |
| 1.4 | User Password Reset | ✅ Aligned | `PUT /profile/password` requires current password before accepting a new one. Clears `must_change_password` flag. |
| 1.5 | User Logout | ✅ Aligned | `POST /logout` clears session. Logout button visible on every page via header. |
| 1.6 | Admin-only Access | ✅ Aligned | Admin tab hidden for non-admins in frontend. `require_admin` dependency re-verifies `is_admin` from session on every admin endpoint. Note: admin status is checked from session, which is set at login from DB—server-side verified. |
| 1.7 | User Profile Tab | ✅ Aligned | Username change (with uniqueness check), password change (current required), optional OpenDota player ID linking with preview when player exists in league data. |
| 2.1 | Grant Starter Tokens on Registration | ✅ Aligned | `INITIAL_TOKENS` env var configures amount; granted at registration. |
| 2.2 | Token Visibility | ✅ Aligned | Token balance shown in header (`#tokenBalance`) across all tabs. Updated after draw, redeem, weekly grant. `drawCounter` on My Team tab syncs with header. |
| 2.3 | View Cards | ⚠️ Diverged | Cards show player identity, rarity, and weekly points. Cards are shown as active or benched. However, the "current week's points" shown for bench cards on the upcoming (unlocked) week will be 0 since matches haven't happened yet—this is technically correct but may confuse users. |
| 2.4 | View Weekly Rosters | ✅ Aligned | Upcoming week is default view. Lock date is visible (`rosterWeekStatus`). Empty active slots rendered explicitly with "— empty slot —" rows. |
| 2.5 | View Current and Season Points | ✅ Aligned | Weekly points (`rosterCombined`) and season points (`rosterSeasonPoints`) shown separately. Week history via `rosterWeekSelect` dropdown. New user with no cards shows 0. |
| 3.1 | Generate Cards | ✅ Aligned | `seed_cards(league_id)` generates cards from ingested player data. Per `seed.py` (referenced but not shown), expected to create 1 legendary, 2 epic, 4 rare, 8 common per player. Deck is shared (cards have `owner_id=NULL` until drawn). Idempotent seeding referenced. |
| 3.2 | Card Drawing | ✅ Aligned | Requires ≥1 token. Card shown in reveal modal. Auto-placed in active roster if slots available, else bench. Prefers players user doesn't own; allows duplicates only when all players owned. |
| 3.3 | Remove Cards from Pool | 🔲 Not implemented | Marked post-MVP in story. No admin endpoint to remove players/cards from pool. |
| 3.4 | Card Rarity | ✅ Aligned | Rarity set at card creation (seed time), not draw time. Shown in reveal modal and roster views via badge CSS class. |
| 3.5 | Assign Randomized Modifiers | ✅ Aligned | Modifiers stored in `card_modifiers` table. Assigned at draw time via `_assign_modifiers`. Visible in card detail and roster views. |
| 3.6 | Modifier Management | ⚠️ Diverged | Admin can edit `modifier_count_*` and `modifier_bonus_pct` weights from the admin tab, and rarity modifier percentages. However, the story says "modifier changes are not applied retroactively without an explicit recalculate action"—the recalculate endpoint only recalculates `fantasy_points` on `PlayerMatchStats`, not card modifiers. Card modifiers on existing cards remain unchanged (correct), but rarity % changes affect scoring immediately via runtime calculation without recalculate. |
| 3.7 | View Seasonal Reserve Cards | ✅ Aligned | Bench cards shown in My Team tab. Cards display player, rarity, and weekly points. Bench hidden for locked past weeks (read-only snapshot). |
| 3.8 | View Permanent Collection | 🔲 Not implemented | Marked post-MVP. No cross-season card collection. |
| 4.1 | Place Cards into Active Slots | ✅ Aligned | 5 slots enforced. Activate/Deactivate endpoints. Duplicate player check prevents two cards of same player being active. Roster changes only on current cards (not locked weeks). |
| 4.2 | Lock Active Cards | ⚠️ Diverged | Auto-lock is handled by `auto_lock_weeks` in background thread. UI shows locked banner and lock date. However, the story says "Auto-lock every Sunday at end of day (UTC)" but `weeks.py` logic is not shown—lock timing depends on the `weeks.py` implementation. Weekly roster snapshot creation during lock is also in `weeks.py` (not visible). |
| 4.3 | Admin Move Series Time Manually | ⚠️ Diverged | `PUT /matches/{match_id}/week` allows overriding which week a match counts for. `POST /admin/sync-match-weeks` auto-syncs from schedule. However, the story asks to see **series** (not individual matches) and correct the **date**. Implementation works at match level and sets a week override rather than correcting the date. Also, the corrected override is preserved across future ingestions (override stored in DB). |
| 4.4 | Preserve Points | ✅ Aligned | Points calculated from stored `PlayerMatchStats` + `WeeklyRosterEntry` snapshots. Season total derived from past week records. |
| 4.5 | View Past Week Snapshots | ✅ Aligned | Week selector dropdown lists all weeks. Past locked weeks show immutable snapshot from `weekly_roster_entries`. Weekly points scoped to that week's time range. Current week accessible via selector. |
| 5.1 | Free Weekly Token | ⚠️ Diverged | Story says "when the week is locked all users are granted 1 additional token." Logic is in `weeks.py` (not shown in codebase). The `auto_lock_weeks` function is called periodically but its implementation is not provided—cannot confirm token grant happens. |
| 5.2 | Token Log (admin) | ⚠️ Diverged | Audit log captures `token_draw`, `token_redeem`, `admin_grant_tokens` actions. However, the story specifically asks for: weekly free token grants showing total users affected (not visible as a distinct log entry), and a dedicated token log view. Implementation uses the general audit log, not a token-specific log. |
| 5.3 | Spend Token to Draw Card | ✅ Aligned | 1 token deducted. Card marked owned. Duplicate player prevention. Reveal modal shown immediately. |
| 5.4 | Redeem Code | ✅ Aligned | Valid code grants tokens. Invalid code shows error. One use per user enforced via `CodeRedemption`. Logged in audit log. |
| 5.5 | Re-roll Modifiers | ⚠️ Diverged | Costs 1 token. Confirmation popup present. Modifiers replaced. Logged. However, story says "quality" is also replaced—implementation only re-rolls modifiers, not rarity/card_type. |
| 6.1 | Score Active Cards | ✅ Aligned | Uses Dota 2 match data via `PlayerMatchStats`. Only locked-week roster entries (snapshots) count for scoring. Duplicate prevention via `week_override_id` or time-range scoping. |
| 6.2 | Card Modifier Scoring | ✅ Aligned | Rarity bonus applied (common +0%, rare +1%, epic +2%, legendary +3% default). Configurable via admin weights (`rarity_common`, etc.). Card stat modifiers also applied on top. |
| 6.3 | Track Season Points | ✅ Aligned | Season points calculated as sum across all locked weeks with rarity + modifier multipliers. Visible on My Team tab and season leaderboard. |
| 6.4 | Track Points per Card | ✅ Aligned | Per-week card points shown in roster view (the `total_points` column per card row). Historical via week selector. |
| 6.5 | Prevent Duplicate Scoring | ✅ Aligned | Match data keyed by `match_id` (primary key). Ingestion is idempotent (already-stored matches skipped per ingest.py reference). Week scoping prevents cross-week double counting. |
| 7.1 | Fetch Player Data | ✅ Aligned | `run_enrichment()` fetches player names and avatars (referenced). `avatar_url` stored on Player model. Missing players handled (NULL avatar/name gracefully displayed). |
| 7.2 | Import Match Data | ✅ Aligned | `PlayerMatchStats` stores kills, assists, deaths, gold_per_min, obs_placed, sen_placed, tower_damage. Fantasy points calculated and stored per player-match. |
| 7.3 | Handle API Failures | ⚠️ Diverged | Auto-ingest wraps each league in try/except and logs failures. However, there's no explicit partial-ingestion rollback mechanism visible in `main.py`—depends on `ingest.py` implementation (not shown). Admin can re-trigger via `/ingest/league/{id}`. |
| 7.4 | Auto-ingest on Startup | ✅ Aligned | `AUTO_INGEST_LEAGUES` env var parsed. Runs in background thread via `ThreadPoolExecutor`. Already-stored matches skipped. Empty string disables (`.isdigit()` filter). Default value is `"19368,19369"` which means empty string doesn't disable—it would need to be explicitly empty. |
| 8.1 | Season Leaderboard | ⚠️ Diverged | `/leaderboard/season` ranks users by cumulative points from locked-week roster snapshots with rarity modifiers applied. However, the SQL does not use `week_override_id`—it only checks `m.start_time BETWEEN wk.start_time AND wk.end_time`, missing matches that were manually assigned to a different week via override. |
| 8.2 | Scrollable Leaderboard | ✅ Aligned | Leaderboard tab is visible and accessible without login. Displayed in its own tab. |
| 8.3 | Show User Rank | ✅ Aligned | Logged-in user's row highlighted with gold color and bold text in both season and weekly leaderboards. |
| 8.4 | Weekly Leaderboard | ⚠️ Diverged | Weekly leaderboard mode available with week selector. Same `week_override_id` issue as 8.1—SQL only checks time range, not overrides. |
| 8.5 | Player Performance Browser | ✅ Aligned | Players tab lists all players with match count, avg points, total points. Filterable by name/team. Player detail modal shows full match history with K/A/D, GPM, wards, tower damage, fantasy points. |
| 8.6 | Team Browser | ✅ Aligned | Teams tab lists teams with match count and player count. Team detail modal shows player roster with stats. |
| 9.1 | Generate Promo Codes | ✅ Aligned | Admin creates codes with configurable token amount. Codes are reusable (multiple users). Each user can only redeem once. Admin can delete codes. |
| 9.2 | Grant Tokens | ✅ Aligned | Admin selects user and grants tokens. Balance updates immediately. Logged with admin actor, target user, and amount. |
| 9.3 | Configure Scoring Weights | ✅ Aligned | Each stat weight editable from admin tab. Rarity modifier percentages also configurable. Recalculate button applies retroactively. |
| 9.4 | Manage Season Lifecycle | ⚠️ Diverged | No explicit "initiate season" or "close season" UI/endpoint. Season weeks are auto-generated. League IDs configured via env vars. No season start/end management controls. |
| 9.5 | View System Status | 🔲 Not implemented | No system status endpoint or UI showing ingest status or schedule cache status. `/schedule/debug` is close but only shows schedule URL status, not overall system state. |
| 9.6 | Start New Season | ⚠️ Diverged | No explicit "start new season" button or endpoint. The migration code in lifespan can reset weeks, but there's no admin-facing DB reset / new season flow. |
| 9.7 | Admin Set Series Date | ⚠️ Diverged | Implementation works at match level (`PUT /matches/{match_id}/week`) setting a week override, not a corrected date. No UI in admin tab for selecting series from a list—only `sync-match-weeks` auto-assigns. Story asks for series-level selection with date display on schedule; implementation uses week assignment. |
| 9.8 | Recalculate Fantasy Points | ✅ Aligned | `/recalculate` applies current weights to all stored stats without re-fetching. Returns count of records updated. Logged in audit log. |
| 9.9 | Manual League Ingestion | ✅ Aligned | Admin enters league ID and triggers ingestion. Fetches matches, calculates fantasy points, seeds cards, enriches profiles. Idempotent. Logged. |
| 9.10 | Schedule Refresh | ✅ Aligned | Refresh button busts in-memory cache. Fresh data fetched from configured Google Sheets URL. Logged in audit log. |
| 10.1 | Explain Scoring | ✅ Aligned | Collapsible "How is scoring calculated?" section in My Team tab lists weighted stats formula. |
| 10.2 | Schedule Tab | ⚠️ Diverged | All series shown chronologically spanning divisions. Upcoming series show date, teams, stream link. Past series show result. Team names link to team modal. Stale cache notice shown. However, past series show `series_result.start_time` (actual match time) but story says "actual match start time"—this depends on schedule.py returning it correctly. Stream link displayed when available. |
| 11.1 | Server-side Validation | ✅ Aligned | All state-changing actions (draw, activate, admin ops) validated server-side via `get_current_user`/`require_admin` dependencies. Admin session re-verified on every request. |
| 11.2 | Audit Logs | ⚠️ Diverged | Tracks: registrations, logins, token draws, code redemptions, admin grants, ingestion, weight changes, recalculations, schedule refreshes, code creation/deletion, rerolls, match week overrides. Each entry has timestamp, actor, action, detail. Visible in admin tab, most recent first. Admin-only. However, **roster changes are not tracked** (story says they don't need to be—aligned). Missing: password reset requests are logged but the story doesn't list them (acceptable). Overall well-covered. |

## Key divergences

1. **Season leaderboard ignores `week_override_id`**: Both `/leaderboard/season` and `/leaderboard/weekly` SQL queries only check `m.start_time BETWEEN wk.start_time AND wk.end_time`, missing matches manually assigned to a different week via override — **update implementation**.

2. **No admin UI for series-level date correction (9.7)**: Story requires selecting a series from a list and setting a corrected week; implementation only exposes per-match week override via API with no admin UI, and auto-sync endpoint operates silently — **update
